Id1.text: Eagle is the successor of American Motors who manufactured the AMC Matador and had Roy D Chapin Jr among their key personnel.

Id2.text: AMC Matador is manufactured by American Motors, a key person of which, is Roy D. Chapin Jr. American Motors successor is Eagle.

Id3.text: Eagle succeeded American Motors who made the AMC Matador in conjunction with Roy D Chapin Jr.
